scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run gen:version && tsc -b
scripts.gen:version: bun run packages/core/scripts/version.ts && bun run packages/edge/scripts/version.ts && bun run packages/elysia/scripts/version.ts && bun run packages/express/scripts/version.ts && bun run packages/fastify/scripts/version.ts && bun run packages/hono/scripts/version.ts
